data.description:
Plugin-era interactive credential-onboarding helper. Only its test references it; no dispatcher arm, no doc. RECOMMEND delete + tests/scripts/test-jira-credential-helper.sh; alternative: expose via a dispatcher arm/doc as a credentials preflight.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Decision recorded; files deleted OR adopted (reachable + documented)
- [ ] Full suite green
data.title: Decide + delete or adopt: jira-credential-helper.sh (+ test)
